content:
# Best AI Code Tools for API Development in 2026

API development requires precision, documentation, and testing. AI tools help you build better APIs faster!

Check out our [[link:/category/Code|Code category]] for more tools.

---

## [[link:/tools/7|GitHub Copilot]]: API Code Generation

[[link:/tools/7|GitHub Copilot]] helps you write API endpoints, models, and controllers faster.

### Copilot for API Development
- **Endpoint generation**: Write REST and GraphQL endpoints quickly
- **Type generation**: Auto-create TypeScript types for API responses
- **Documentation hints**: Suggests docstrings as you code

**Try GitHub Copilot**: https://github.com/copilot

---

## [[link:/tools/13|Cursor]]: API Documentation Assistant

[[link:/tools/13|Cursor]] helps you understand and document APIs with natural language queries.

### Cursor for API Development
- **Chat with your API**: Ask questions about your codebase
- **Auto-documentation**: Generate API docs automatically
- **Code refactoring**: Improve API structure with AI

**Try Cursor**: https://cursor.sh

---

## Comparison Table

| Tool | Best For | Price | API Focus |
|------|----------|-------|-----------|
| [[link:/tools/7|GitHub Copilot]] | Code generation | $10/mo | General APIs |
| [[link:/tools/13|Cursor]] | Documentation | $20/mo | Full-stack |
| [[link:/tools/202|CodiumAI]] | Testing | $19/mo | Quality assurance |

---

## Our Recommendations

- **Code generation**: Start with [[link:/tools/7|GitHub Copilot]]
- **Documentation**: Try [[link:/tools/13|Cursor]]
- **API testing**: Use [[link:/tools/202|CodiumAI]]

Ready to build better APIs? Try these AI tools today!
